tasks.name: Add CALCOM_API_KEY to environment configuration
tasks.purpose: Configure Cal.com API authentication credentials for development and production environments

constraints: Add CALCOM_API_KEY with placeholder value in .env.example
Document Cal.com API key format (cal_live_xxx or cal_test_xxx)
Do not commit actual API keys

tasks.input_state: .env files exist without Cal.com configuration
tasks.output_state: .env.example and .env.development contain CALCOM_API_KEY and CALCOM_API_VERSION variables with documentation
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Both files contain CALCOM_API_KEY and CALCOM_API_VERSION with comments explaining format

tasks.name: Create Cal.com configuration module
tasks.purpose: Centralize Cal.com API configuration including base URL, API version, and authentication headers

constraints: Export getCalcomConfig() function that reads from environment
Throw error if CALCOM_API_KEY is missing

tasks.input_state: Environment variables configured, no Cal.com config module exists
tasks.output_state: apps/web/lib/calcom/config.ts exists with exported getCalcomConfig() function and CalcomConfig type
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exports Cal.com configuration object with baseUrl, apiKey, and version from environment variables
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export function getCalcomConfig' apps/web/lib/calcom/config.ts

tasks.name: Create Cal.com booking types

action.target: TypeScript types for Cal.com API v2 booking response

tasks.purpose: Define TypeScript interfaces matching Cal.com API v2 booking structure for type-safe data handling

constraints: Define CalcomBookingResponse interface matching API structure
Include fields: id, uid, title, description, startTime, endTime, status, meetingUrl
Define CalcomBookingStatus enum or type union
Use ISO 8601 string types for dates

tasks.input_state: No Cal.com API types exist in codebase
tasks.output_state: apps/web/lib/calcom/types.ts exists with CalcomBookingResponse and related types exported
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exports CalcomBookingResponse interface with all required fields matching Cal.com API v2 structure
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export interface CalcomBookingResponse' apps/web/lib/calcom/types.ts

tasks.name: Create simplified CoachingSession type
tasks.purpose: Define simplified UI-focused type for coaching sessions transformed from Cal.com API response

constraints: Extend existing CoachingSession type from F1
Add fields: id, title, startTime, endTime, duration, meetingUrl, rescheduleUrl
Use Date objects for startTime/endTime (not strings)

tasks.input_state: CalcomBookingResponse type exists, CoachingSession type stub exists from F1
tasks.output_state: CoachingSession type in coaching.types.ts includes all fields needed for UI display with proper Date types
tasks.acceptance_criterion: CoachingSession interface exported with id, title, startTime (Date), endTime (Date), duration, meetingUrl, rescheduleUrl

tasks.name: Create fetchCalcomBookings service function
tasks.purpose: Implement Cal.com API client function to fetch upcoming bookings using authentication and proper headers

constraints: Use fetch() with Cal.com API v2 endpoint (GET /v2/bookings)
Use service logger pattern from certificate-service

tasks.input_state: Config and types exist, no service function for API calls
tasks.output_state: calcom.service.ts exports fetchCalcomBookings() function that calls Cal.com API with authentication
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function successfully fetches bookings from Cal.com API v2 with proper authentication headers and returns CalcomBookingResponse[]
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export async function fetchCalcomBookings' apps/web/lib/calcom/calcom.service.ts

tasks.name: Create transformBookingToSession utility function
tasks.purpose: Transform Cal.com API booking response to simplified CoachingSession format for UI consumption

constraints: Convert ISO string dates to Date objects

tasks.input_state: CalcomBookingResponse and CoachingSession types exist, no transformation function
tasks.output_state: transformBookingToSession() exported from calcom.service.ts converts API response to UI type
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function converts CalcomBookingResponse to CoachingSession with proper Date conversions and calculated fields
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export function transformBookingToSession' apps/web/lib/calcom/calcom.service.ts

tasks.name: Create getUpcomingSessions service function
tasks.purpose: Create high-level service function that fetches, filters, sorts, and transforms bookings to upcoming sessions

constraints: Filter for future sessions only (startTime > now)
Limit to 2 sessions (requirement from feature doc)
Handle errors gracefully (return empty array on API failure)

tasks.input_state: fetchCalcomBookings and transformBookingToSession functions exist
tasks.output_state: getUpcomingSessions() exported from calcom.service.ts returns up to 2 future CoachingSession objects
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function returns maximum 2 future coaching sessions sorted by startTime, transformed to CoachingSession type
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export async function getUpcomingSessions' apps/web/lib/calcom/calcom.service.ts

tasks.name: Create coaching.loader.ts with cached loader
tasks.purpose: Create server-side data loader with per-request caching for coaching sessions

constraints: Export loadCoachingSessions with React cache() wrapper
Return CoachingSession[] or null on error

tasks.input_state: getUpcomingSessions service function exists, no loader file
tasks.output_state: coaching.loader.ts exports loadCoachingSessions() with React cache wrapper for per-request deduplication
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader function exported with cache() wrapper that calls getUpcomingSessions() and returns CoachingSession[]
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q "import 'server-only'" apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/coaching.loader.ts && grep -q 'export const loadCoachingSessions = cache' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/coaching.loader.ts

tasks.name: Add error handling wrapper to coaching loader

action.target: try-catch error handling to coaching loader

tasks.purpose: Ensure graceful degradation when Cal.com API is unavailable or returns errors

constraints: Return empty array on error (graceful fallback)
Do not throw errors to UI

tasks.input_state: coaching.loader.ts exists without error handling
tasks.output_state: coaching.loader.ts includes try-catch with logging and returns empty array on Cal.com API failures
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader catches errors, logs them with service logger, and returns empty array instead of throwing

tasks.name: Update dashboard loader to include coaching data
tasks.purpose: Integrate coaching sessions data loading into main dashboard data loader with parallel fetching

constraints: Replace empty array placeholder from F1 with loadCoachingSessions() call
Use Promise.all for parallel fetching if multiple loaders exist
Update return type to include CoachingSession[]

tasks.input_state: load-user-workspace.ts returns coachingSessions: [] placeholder, coaching loader exists
tasks.output_state: load-user-workspace.ts calls loadCoachingSessions() and returns actual coaching data in parallel with other data
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard loader calls loadCoachingSessions() and includes result in returned workspace data

tasks.name: Update dashboard page to pass coaching data

action.target: user home page.tsx to load and pass coaching data

tasks.purpose: Connect dashboard page to coaching loader and pass data to CoachingSessionsCard component
tasks.input_state: Dashboard page passes null to CoachingSessionsCard, loader returns coaching data
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page loads coaching sessions and passes actual data to CoachingSessionsCard
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page component calls loader, extracts coaching sessions, and passes to CoachingSessionsCard as sessions prop

tasks.name: Create formatSessionTime utility function

action.target: formatSessionTime helper for relative time display

tasks.purpose: Format session date/time in user-friendly relative format (e.g., 'Tomorrow at 2pm', 'In 3 days')

constraints: Return string in format: 'Today at 2:00 PM' or 'Tomorrow at 3:30 PM' or 'Jan 25 at 10:00 AM'
Handle today, tomorrow, and future dates

tasks.input_state: No time formatting utility exists for coaching sessions
tasks.output_state: time-formatting.ts exports formatSessionTime() that converts Date to user-friendly relative string
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function returns properly formatted relative time strings with 12-hour time format
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export function formatSessionTime' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/utils/time-formatting.ts

tasks.name: Create CoachingSessionItem component
tasks.purpose: Build component to display single coaching session with date, time, duration, and action buttons

constraints: Accept session prop of type CoachingSession
Use Tailwind for layout (no need for full Card component)

tasks.input_state: CoachingSession type and formatSessionTime exist, no session item component
tasks.output_state: coaching-session-item.tsx exports CoachingSessionItem component displaying session details with action buttons area
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders session title, formatted time, duration, and action buttons placeholder for given CoachingSession
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export function CoachingSessionItem' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/coaching-session-item.tsx

tasks.name: Create SessionActionButtons component

action.target: session-action-buttons.tsx with Join and Reschedule buttons

tasks.purpose: Build action buttons component with Join (meeting URL) and Reschedule (Cal.com link) functionality

constraints: Join button: variant='default', links to meetingUrl, opens in new tab
Reschedule button: variant='outline', links to rescheduleUrl, opens in new tab
Include ExternalLink icon on both buttons
Use Next.js Link component for navigation

tasks.input_state: No action buttons component exists for coaching sessions
tasks.output_state: session-action-buttons.tsx exports SessionActionButtons with Join and Reschedule buttons
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component renders two buttons (Join primary, Reschedule outline) that link to meeting and reschedule URLs
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export function SessionActionButtons' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/session-action-buttons.tsx

tasks.name: Wire SessionActionButtons into CoachingSessionItem
tasks.purpose: Connect action buttons to session item component to complete session display with interactive buttons

constraints: Replace action buttons placeholder in CoachingSessionItem
Pass session.meetingUrl and session.rescheduleUrl as props
Position buttons at bottom of session item card

tasks.input_state: CoachingSessionItem has placeholder for action buttons, SessionActionButtons component exists
tasks.output_state: CoachingSessionItem renders SessionActionButtons with meetingUrl and rescheduleUrl from session prop
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Session item displays working Join and Reschedule buttons that link to correct URLs

tasks.name: Update CoachingSessionsCard to render session list
tasks.purpose: Replace placeholder content in card with actual list of CoachingSessionItem components

constraints: Replace placeholder content state with map over sessions array
Maintain skeleton and empty state logic from F1

tasks.input_state: CoachingSessionsCard shows placeholder for content state, CoachingSessionItem component complete
tasks.output_state: CoachingSessionsCard renders list of CoachingSessionItem components when sessions array is populated
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Card displays CoachingSessionItem for each session in sessions prop with proper spacing

tasks.name: Add loading skeleton to coaching sessions card

action.target: Suspense boundary with skeleton to dashboard page

tasks.purpose: Wrap CoachingSessionsCard with Suspense to show loading skeleton during data fetching
tasks.input_state: Dashboard page renders CoachingSessionsCard without Suspense, skeleton component exists
tasks.output_state: CoachingSessionsCard wrapped in Suspense with CoachingSessionsSkeleton as fallback for progressive rendering
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page uses Suspense to show loading skeleton while coaching sessions data loads asynchronously
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'Suspense' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && grep -q 'CoachingSessionsSkeleton' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx

tasks.name: Add error boundary to coaching sessions card
tasks.purpose: Gracefully handle runtime errors in coaching sessions rendering without breaking entire dashboard

dependencies: React ErrorBoundary or Next.js error boundary
constraints: Show CoachingSessionsEmptyState as fallback UI on error
Log errors but don't crash dashboard

tasks.input_state: CoachingSessionsCard has Suspense but no error boundary
tasks.output_state: CoachingSessionsCard wrapped in error boundary that shows empty state on errors
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard gracefully handles coaching sessions errors by showing empty state without crashing

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test file exists with passing tests verifying loader behavior and error handling

tasks.name: Add E2E test for coaching sessions display

action.target: E2E test verifying sessions display on dashboard

tasks.purpose: Validate end-to-end user experience of viewing and interacting with coaching sessions on dashboard

constraints: Test: Navigate to /home, verify coaching card appears

Test: Click Reschedule button, verify Cal.com opens
